member.name: T:Application.Common.Behaviors.LoggingBehavior`2
member.summary: MediatR pipeline behavior that logs each request name, elapsed time, and warns on slow requests (> 500ms).

member.name: M:Application.Common.Behaviors.LoggingBehavior`2.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Application.Common.Behaviors.LoggingBehavior{`0,`1}})
member.summary: MediatR pipeline behavior that logs each request name, elapsed time, and warns on slow requests (> 500ms).

member.name: T:Application.Common.Behaviors.ValidationBehavior`2
member.summary: MediatR pipeline behavior that auto-validates commands/queries using registered FluentValidation validators before the handler runs. Throws ValidationException with all errors if invalid.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Behaviors.ValidationBehavior`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FluentValidation.IValidator{`0}})
member.summary: MediatR pipeline behavior that auto-validates commands/queries using registered FluentValidation validators before the handler runs. Throws ValidationException with all errors if invalid.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Exceptions.ConcurrencyException
member.summary: Thrown when a database concurrency conflict occurs. Maps to 409 Conflict.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Exceptions.ConflictException
member.summary: Thrown when a conflict exists with current state. Maps to 409.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Exceptions.ForbiddenException
member.summary: Thrown when the caller lacks permission. Maps to 403.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested resource is not found. Maps to 404.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IShiftRepository
member.summary: Shift Repository — CRUD operations for cinema shifts. Each cinema can have multiple shifts: Morning, Afternoon, Evening.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Simplified Unit of Work — manages transaction boundaries only. Does NOT contain repository properties (repositories are injected separately).

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IWorkScheduleRepository
member.summary: Employee Work Schedule Repository. Manages assigning staff to shifts by date.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IIdentityUserService
member.summary: Identity user management — registration, login, profile, password reset.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IOtpService
member.summary: OTP generation and validation for password reset flow.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IRoleService
member.summary: Role management — CRUD operations for Identity roles.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.ITokenClaimService
member.summary: JWT token generation and validation.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.ITokenClaimService.RevokeRefreshTokenAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Revoke refresh token — used for logout functionality.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.ITokenClaimService.StoreRefreshTokenAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Store refresh token in cache.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IUserManagementService
member.summary: Advanced user management — list, lock/unlock accounts. Separated from IIdentityUserService to maintain Single Responsibility.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IUserManagementService.GetAllUsersAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get paginated user list, supports filtering by role/status/search keyword.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IUserManagementService.LockUserAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Lock account — user cannot login until unlocked.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.IUserManagementService.UnlockUserAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Unlock account — allows login again.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.PagedUserResult
member.summary: Paginated result of user list.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Security.UserListItem
member.summary: User information in list (summary, excludes sensitive data).

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService
member.summary: Redis distributed cache abstraction.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IEmailService
member.summary: Email sending service — booking confirmations and general emails.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPaymentGateway
member.summary: Abstraction over payment gateways (VnPay, Momo, ZaloPay, etc.). The Application layer uses this interface; Infrastructure implements it.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPaymentGateway.CreatePaymentUrl(Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.PaymentRequest,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a payment URL to redirect the user to.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPaymentGateway.ProcessCallback(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Process the callback query string from the payment gateway.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatLockService
member.summary: Redis-backed seat locking service. Locks are set when a booking is created (15-min TTL) and released when booking is completed, cancelled, or expired.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatLockService.LockSeatsAsync(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid},System.Guid,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lock seats for a specific booking with TTL.

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatLockService.ReleaseSeatsAsync(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Release locked seats (called on cancel/complete/expire).

member.name: M:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatLockService.GetSeatStatusesAsync(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the current lock status for each seat in a showtime.

member.name: T:Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatNotificationService
member.summary: Abstraction for real-time seat status notifications (e.g., via SignalR). Infrastructure layer provides the concrete implementation.

member.name: T:Application.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Registers all Application layer services. Called from Api/Program.cs: builder.Services.AddApplication()

member.name: T:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCancelledEventHandler
member.summary: Handles BookingCancelledEvent: - Logs the cancellation - Future: Send SignalR update to release seats on seat map - Future: Send cancellation email to customer

member.name: M:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCancelledEventHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCancelledEventHandler},Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatNotificationService)
member.summary: Handles BookingCancelledEvent: - Logs the cancellation - Future: Send SignalR update to release seats on seat map - Future: Send cancellation email to customer

member.name: T:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCompletedEventHandler
member.summary: Handles BookingCompletedEvent: - Sends confirmation email - Logs the completed booking - Future: Send SignalR update, generate QR code

member.name: M:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCompletedEventHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCompletedEventHandler},Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatNotificationService)
member.summary: Handles BookingCompletedEvent: - Sends confirmation email - Logs the completed booking - Future: Send SignalR update, generate QR code

member.name: T:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCreatedEventHandler
member.summary: Handles BookingCreatedEvent: - Logs the booking creation - Future: Send real-time notification via SignalR

member.name: M:Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCreatedEventHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Application.Features.Bookings.EventHandlers.BookingCreatedEventHandler},Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ISeatNotificationService)
member.summary: Handles BookingCreatedEvent: - Logs the booking creation - Future: Send real-time notification via SignalR

member.name: T:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetRevenueReport.GetRevenueReportHandler
member.summary: Revenue report handler — aggregates ticket + concession revenue over a time period. Supports grouping by day/week/month for dashboard charts.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetRevenueReport.GetRevenueReportHandler.#ctor(Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IBookingRepository,Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IConcessionSaleRepository)
member.summary: Revenue report handler — aggregates ticket + concession revenue over a time period. Supports grouping by day/week/month for dashboard charts.

member.name: T:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetRevenueReport.GetRevenueReportQuery
member.summary: Query for revenue reports — supports filtering by time period, cinema, and grouping by day/week/month. Admin: view entire chain (cinemaId = null). Manager: view managed cinema.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetRevenueReport.GetRevenueReportQuery.#ctor(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Query for revenue reports — supports filtering by time period, cinema, and grouping by day/week/month. Admin: view entire chain (cinemaId = null). Manager: view managed cinema.

member.name: T:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetTopMovies.GetTopMoviesHandler
member.summary: Top-grossing movies handler — join Booking → Showtime → Movie to aggregate revenue and ticket count by movie.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetTopMovies.GetTopMoviesHandler.#ctor(Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IBookingRepository,Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IShowtimeRepository,Application.Common.Interfaces.Persistence.IMovieRepository)
member.summary: Top-grossing movies handler — join Booking → Showtime → Movie to aggregate revenue and ticket count by movie.

member.name: T:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetTopMovies.GetTopMoviesQuery
member.summary: Query for top-grossing movies — sorted by revenue or ticket volume.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Dashboard.Queries.GetTopMovies.GetTopMoviesQuery.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Query for top-grossing movies — sorted by revenue or ticket volume.

member.name: T:Application.Features.Inventory.EventHandlers.LowStockAlertEventHandler
member.summary: Handles LowStockAlertEvent: - Logs critical warning - Future: Send email/SMS alert to inventory manager - Future: Auto-create restock order

member.summary: Handles LowStockAlertEvent: - Logs critical warning - Future: Send email/SMS alert to inventory manager - Future: Auto-create restock order

member.name: T:Application.Features.Schedules.Commands.BulkCreateSchedule.BulkCreateScheduleCommand
member.summary: Bulk scheduling — Manager assigns shifts for the whole week for multiple staff. Validate each entry, skip if schedule conflict exists.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Schedules.Commands.BulkCreateSchedule.BulkCreateScheduleCommand.#ctor(Shared.Models.DataModels.StaffDtos.BulkScheduleRequest)
member.summary: Bulk scheduling — Manager assigns shifts for the whole week for multiple staff. Validate each entry, skip if schedule conflict exists.

member.name: T:Application.Features.Schedules.Commands.CreateSchedule.CreateScheduleCommand
member.summary: Assign a specific shift to an employee. Validate: no duplicate schedule on the same day.

member.summary: Assign a specific shift to an employee. Validate: no duplicate schedule on the same day.

member.summary: Get weekly schedule — displayed in table: staff x day x shift.

member.name: M:Application.Features.Schedules.Queries.GetWeeklySchedule.GetWeeklyScheduleQuery.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Get weekly schedule — displayed in table: staff x day x shift.

member.summary: Create a new cinema shift — Manager creates shifts: "Morning Shift", "Afternoon Shift", "Evening Shift".

member.summary: Create a new cinema shift — Manager creates shifts: "Morning Shift", "Afternoon Shift", "Evening Shift".

member.summary: Delete shift — ensures no active schedules exist before deletion.

member.summary: Handles ShowtimeCancelledEvent: - Logs the cancellation - Future: notify affected customers, auto-cancel bookings
